name: Reynolds Consumer Products Inc.
business: Reynolds Consumer Products produces and sells household products for cooking, serving, cleanup, and storage under brands such as Reynolds and Hefty, as well as store brands. The company sells to a diverse set of retail partners including grocery stores, mass merchants, warehouse clubs, and eCommerce retailers.

exposures.sentence: We produce and sell products that people use in their homes for cooking, serving, cleanup and storage.
Our customer base includes leading grocery stores, mass merchants, warehouse clubs, discount chains, dollar stores, drug stores, home improvement stores, military outlets and eCommerce retailers.
Aluminum prices have been historically volatile as aluminum is a cyclical commodity with prices subject to global market factors.
Resin prices have historically fluctuated with changes in crude oil and natural gas prices as well as changes in refining capacity and the demand for other petroleum-based products.

We also offer more sustainable solutions, such as Reynolds Wrap 100% recycled aluminum, unbleached parchment paper made with a chlorine-free process and coreless wax paper, which uses less packaging material than traditional wax paper rolls.
We distribute our products and receive raw materials primarily by rail and truck.
Labor shortages and increased labor costs have had and could have a material adverse effect on our business and operations.
Our manufacturing operations and distribution network rely heavily on a stable and continuous supply of electricity.

catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we launched the line of Hefty ECOSAVE Cutlery, a high quality compostable offering.
On January 29, 2026, a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share was declared and is to be paid on February 27, 2026.
